zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert FitzHugh於1142年出生在蘇格蘭艾爾金爾時，他的父親Lord Robert De Fitzhugh Of Tattershall32歲，母親Isabel de Welles5歲。他和Alice Greystoke至少有1個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於1201年在他的家鄉享年59歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭艾爾金爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert FitzHugh于1142年出生在苏格兰艾爾金爾时，他的父亲Lord Robert De Fitzhugh Of Tattershall32岁，母亲Isabel de Welles5岁。他和Alice Greystoke至少有1个儿子和3个女儿。他去世于1201年在他的家乡享年59岁，埋葬在苏格兰艾爾金爾。

nameMeanings.name: FitzHugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Northamptonshire): from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + the personal name Hugh (see Hugh ), ‘son of Hugh’.

History: William Fitzhugh (1651–1701), from Bedford, England, emigrated to VA c. 1670 and established himself on the Potomac River in what was then Stafford County, VA, as a planter and exporter. He also practiced law, was a member of the Virginia House of Burgesses, and served in 1687 as lieutenant colonel of the county militia.

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (from Latin filius), used originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same personal name and then conventionalized as a hereditary surname, or short for a surname of which fiz ‘son’ was the first element, for example Fitzhenry and Fitzroy .
German: from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Vinzenz (see Vincent ) or Vitus (see Vito , compare Veit ). Compare also Fietz .

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert FitzHugh was born in 1142, in Elginshire, Scotland, his father, Lord Robert De Fitzhugh Of Tattershall, was 32 and his mother, Isabel de Welles, was 5. He had at least 1 son and 3 daughters with Alice Greystoke. He died in 1201, in his hometown, at the age of 59, and was buried in Elginshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert FitzHugh est né en 1142, à Elginshire, Écosse, son père, Lord Robert De Fitzhugh Of Tattershall, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Isabel de Welles, avait 5 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles avec Alice Greystoke. Il est décédé en 1201, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterré à Elginshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert FitzHugh 1142 in Elginshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Lord Robert De Fitzhugh Of Tattershall 32 und seine Mutter Isabel de Welles 5. Er hatte mit Alice Greystoke mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1201 im Alter von 59 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Elginshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert FitzHugh è nato il nel 1142 nel Elginshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Lord Robert De Fitzhugh Of Tattershall, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Isabel de Welles, aveva 5 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie con Alice Greystoke. Morì nel 1201, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 59 anni, e fu sepolto a Elginshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert FitzHughが1142年にスコットランドエルジンシュアイアで生まれた時，父Lord Robert De Fitzhugh Of Tattershallは32歳，母Isabel de Wellesは5歳であった。彼はAlice Greystokeとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼は1201年に故郷で59歳で死去し，スコットランドエルジンシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert FitzHugh(이)가 1142년 스컷랜드 엘긴실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lord Robert De Fitzhugh Of Tattershall(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel de Welles(은)는 5세였다. 그는 Alice Greystoke(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1201년 그의 고향에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 엘긴실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert FitzHugh nasceu em 1142, em Elginshire, Scotland, seu pai, Lord Robert De Fitzhugh Of Tattershall, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Isabel de Welles, tinha 5 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas com Alice Greystoke. Ele faleceu em 1201, em sua cidade natal, com 59 anos, e foi sepultado em Elginshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert FitzHugh родился в 1142 г. в местности элгиншир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Lord Robert De Fitzhugh Of Tattershall было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Isabel de Welles, 5. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери от Alice Greystoke. Он умер в 1201 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 59 лет и был похоронен в местности элгиншир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert FitzHugh nació en 1142, en Elginshire, Scotland, su papá, Lord Robert De Fitzhugh Of Tattershall, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Isabel de Welles, tenía 5 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas con Alice Greystoke. Murió en 1201, en su pueblo, a la edad de 59 años, y fue sepultado en Elginshire, Scotland.
